title: Tiny Tenna
description: Turns the copper golem into Mr. (Ant) Tenna from Deltarune chapter 3.
body:
This pack turns the copper golem into Mr. (Ant) Tenna from Deltarune Chapter 3. No mods are required for anything in this pack. Now updated to 26.2.

![Copper golems, reskinned into Mr. (Ant) Tenna, on display in a game show.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae93724709e6aa53dfbd63632427f8848fd48815.png)

Changes include:

COPPER GOLEM:
- Unoxidized: Mr. (Ant) Tenna
- Exposed: Doctor Tennaville
- Weathered: Golden Tenna from the Susie-zilla minigame
- Oxidized: The inconspicuous Dreemurr household television

COPPER CHEST:
- Unoxidized: "Dark chest", found throughout all Dark Worlds
- All other oxidation levels: Patented TV TIME Mystery Balls, colored to suit the three heroes of the Lancer Fan Club.

Feel free to rearrange, delete, or modify the files in this pack however you want, as long as you don't release them publicly alongside my files.

Also includes little icons in Tenna's subtitles and certain item names (only in the English languages). Thanks to Seb_Semos on Planetminecraft for helping. These icons don't conflict with any similar unicode-text-replacing packs I tested, but I can't guarantee that it won't affect any packs you might be using.
(The words displayed in the icons can NOT be searched for in the Creative inventory. You'll have to search for "Mystery ball", not "TV TIME/Rude/Fluffy mystery ball".)
